options.content: Inspect the platform and data-support Pods behind DropMong after service impact is known. Application service Pods belong in Ops 01; Node pressure belongs in Ops 12.

panels.title: Supporting Pod Runtime Status
panels.description: One row per active platform or data-support Pod. Application service Pods, completed Jobs and pgAdmin are excluded; Restart Increase uses the selected dashboard time range.

targets.expr: label_join(max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod")

max by (pod_key) (label_join((100 * max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_ready{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",condition="true"})) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((round(sum by (namespace,pod) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}[$__range])))) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

max by (pod_key,reason) (label_join((max by (namespace,pod,reason) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}"} == 1)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

max by (pod_key) (label_join(((max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",reason="OOMKilled"})) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1))) or on (namespace,pod) 0 * max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

max by (pod_key) (label_join((time() - max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_created{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}"})) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

max by (pod_key,phase) (label_join((max by (namespace,pod,phase) (kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

panels.title: Supporting Pod Resource Snapshot
panels.description: Current platform and data-support Pod resource usage. Empty request or limit percentages mean the corresponding Kubernetes denominator is not configured or unavailable.

targets.expr: label_join(max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod")

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}[$__rate_interval]))) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="cpu",unit="core",container!="",container!="POD"}), 0.001)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="cpu",unit="core",container!="",container!="POD"}), 0.001)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((sum by (namespace,pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""})) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="memory",unit="byte",container!="",container!="POD"}), 1)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="memory",unit="byte",container!="",container!="POD"}), 1)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

sum by (pod_key) (label_join((100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)), "pod_key", "/", "namespace", "pod"))

panels.title: Top CPU Limit Utilization by Supporting Pod
panels.description: Top 15 platform and data-support Pods by current CPU limit utilization. Pods without a CPU limit are omitted.

targets.expr: topk(15, (100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="cpu",unit="core",container!="",container!="POD"}), 0.001)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)) )

panels.title: Top Memory Limit Utilization by Supporting Pod
panels.description: Top 15 platform and data-support Pods by current memory limit utilization. Pods without a memory limit are omitted.

targets.expr: topk(15, (100 * sum by (namespace,pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD",image!=""}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="memory",unit="byte",container!="",container!="POD"}), 1)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)) )

topk(15, (sum by (namespace,pod,container) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}[$__rate_interval]))) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)))

topk(15, (100 * sum by (namespace,pod,container) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod,container) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)))

topk(15, (sum by (namespace,pod,container) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"})) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1)))

(100 * sum by (namespace,pod,container) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",container!="",container!="POD"}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace,pod,container) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",resource="memory",unit="byte"}), 1)) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1))

(sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",pod!=""}[$__rate_interval]))) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1))

(sum by (namespace,pod) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",pod!=""}[$__rate_interval]))) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (max by (namespace,pod,node,created_by_name) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",namespace=~"(dropmong-messaging|kong|kube-system|local-path-storage|monitoring|observability)"} or kube_pod_info{namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",created_by_name=~"(auth-db|user-db|catalog-db|coupon-db|coupon-redis|interest-db|order-db|payment-db)"}) and on (namespace,pod) max by (namespace,pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running|Failed|Unknown"} == 1))
